notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Aaron Judge reaches on a fielder's choice. Austin Wells to 2nd. Austin Wells advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by third baseman Yoán Moncada.

notableEvents.label: Mike Trout reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Mike Trout reaches on a fielding error by shortstop José Caballero.

notableEvents.label: Jo Adell GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jo Adell grounds into a double play, shortstop José Caballero to second baseman Jazz Chisholm Jr. to first baseman Paul Goldschmidt. Yoán Moncada out at 2nd. Jo Adell out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jo Adell rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jo Adell grounds into a double play, shortstop José Caballero to second baseman Jazz Chisholm Jr. to first baseman Paul Goldschmidt. Yoán Moncada out at 2nd. Jo Adell out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Walk-off loss
notableEvents.detail: Ryan McMahon walks. José Caballero scores. Austin Wells to 3rd. Wild pitch by pitcher Jordan Romano.
